MicroRealEstate is an open-source JavaScript application designed to help landlords manage their rental properties. It provides a centralized platform for storing property and tenant information, creating leases, tracking rent payments, generating custom documents, and facilitating collaboration among users.

рҹ“қ рқ—”рқ—•рқ—ўрқ—Ёрқ—§ рқ—§рқ—ӣрқ—ңрқ—Ұ рқ—Јрқ—Ҙрқ—ўрқ—қрқ—ҳрқ—–рқ—§

Dangerzone is a security tool that converts potentially dangerous documents (PDFs, Office files, images) into safe, pixel-based PDFs. It achieves this by processing the documents within an isolated sandbox environment, stripping away any executable content and rendering them as raw image data before reconstructing them into a new, secure PDF.

EaseMaster is a TypeScript-based tool for modern frontend development that visualizes and generates easing functions for animations. It allows designers and developers to create and export custom Cubic Bezier curves and Spring physics animations into production-ready code for CSS, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion, and GSAP.

WinShot is a lightweight and performant screenshot tool for Windows, built with Wails (Go + React). It offers a modern glassmorphism UI and a wide range of features for capturing, annotating, and exporting screenshots efficiently.

PCLink is a cross-platform desktop application that provides secure remote PC control and management. It features a lightweight built-in WebUI and API, enabling local or remote access to your computer's functionalities.
